creator: scratch65535@messagebox.email
text:
Currently, every copy of xfce4-terminal is a virtual clone of every other:  changing the characteristics of one changes those characteristics in all.  The only exception (that I know of) the title; setting one title doesn't set them all.

It would be very nice if all the attributes, e.g. colors, fonts, startup subtree, etc., could be set on an individual basis.  Then those who want to dedicate a specific set of attributes to a particular problem or utility (e.g. MariaDB, Top, etc) could do so and create links to launch them already prepped.
